summary: Comprehensive testing of GharSetu platform - AI Chatbot (GPT-5.2), Reels page, Voice search, Category pages, Listing details with Chat With Owner. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All key features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend chatbot shows 403 error when sending message without authentication. Expected behavior - API requires auth.
integration_issues.note: This is correct behavior - chatbot API requires authentication. Users see prompt to login.

issues: The chatbot quick prompts area could be more prominent for new users

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (19/19 PASSED) ===
Health endpoint returns healthy status
Categories endpoint returns all 5 categories (home, business, stay, event, services)
User registration creates new user with token
User login returns valid token
Invalid login returns 401 Unauthorized
Get current user returns authenticated user data
Get listings returns listings with pagination
Get listings by category filters correctly
Get trending listings sorted by views/likes
Search listings returns matching results
Get videos returns videos with pagination
Videos pagination works correctly
Videos by category filters correctly
Record video view increments view count
AI Chatbot responds to messages (GPT-5.2 working)
AI Chatbot handles property search queries
AI Chatbot requires authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
Get conversations returns user conversations
Get wishlist returns user saved listings
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS (ALL PASSED) ===
Homepage loads with hero section and animations
Voice search button visible in hero section
All 5 category cards displayed (home, business, stay, event, services)
AI Chatbot floating button at bottom right (data-testid='chatbot-trigger')
AI Chatbot window opens on click (data-testid='chatbot-window')
AI Chatbot shows Gujarati greeting message
AI Chatbot quick prompts displayed (Find 2 BHK, Office space, Hotels, Marriage hall, Plumber)
AI Chatbot input and send button functional
Reels page loads with 5 videos (data-testid='reels-page')
Reels Like/Save/Share buttons functional (data-testid='reel-like-btn', 'reel-save-btn')
Reels navigation with arrow keys and buttons works
Reels video counter shows current position (1/5, 2/5, etc.)
Category pages load with listings (Found 3 home listings)
Category filter dropdowns work correctly
Listing detail page shows property info, amenities, specifications
Chat with Owner button present (data-testid='chat-with-owner-btn')
Chat with Owner requires login - shows toast 'Please login to chat with owner'
Navigation between pages works (Home -> Category -> Listing -> Reels)
critical_code_review_comments: AI Chatbot integration with GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM is working correctly
Chatbot properly requires authentication - unauthenticated users see login prompt
Reels page implementation follows Instagram-style UX with scroll snap
Direct chat component properly shows login requirement toast
test_credentials: Test users created dynamically with unique emails during testing
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used - 5 videos in reels, listings in all categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) AI Chatbot (GPT-5.2) responds in Gujarati, requires auth, has quick prompts 2) Reels page shows 5 videos with Like/Save/Share 3) Voice search button present in hero 4) Direct Chat requires login (shows toast) 5) All category pages and listing details functional. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_gharsetu_api.py covers all major APIs.

AI_Chatbot.details: GPT-5.2 powered, responds in Gujarati, quick prompts available, requires authentication

Reels_Page.details: 5 videos loaded, Instagram-style vertical scroll, Like/Save/Share buttons, video counter

Voice_Search.details: Microphone button visible in hero search, uses Web Speech API

Direct_Chat.details: Chat with Owner button shows login toast for unauthenticated users

Navigation.details: All routes work - Home, Categories, Listings, Reels
